description: Labeled routing eval — realistic user prompts mapped to the agent that SHOULD win. Used by intent-eval.test.js to measure route_intent top-1 / top-3 accuracy. Add cases freely; this is how routing quality becomes measurable instead of dummy.

cases.prompt: I'm getting a TypeError: cannot read property 'map' of undefined on line 42
the build is failing with a typescript error TS2322 type mismatch
review this authentication code for security vulnerabilities
is my JWT signing implementation secure against tampering
this API endpoint is really slow, taking 3 seconds to respond
production is down, users getting 500 errors on login
write unit tests for this payment calculation function
clean up the dead code and unused imports in this module
help me plan the architecture for a new microservices system
migrate this project from Next.js 12 to Next.js 15
the form doesn't work well on mobile and screen readers can't use it
will this system handle 10000 concurrent users at launch
npm install keeps failing with peer dependency conflicts

cut a new release version with a proper changelog and tag

the code works but returns wrong data with no error thrown

scan my code and git history for leaked API keys and secrets

update the README and write documentation for this feature
